name: Mulan

skills.name: Great Wall Guardian (Dual Swords Form)
skills.description: Gains Movement Speed when using dual swords. Skills and Basic Attacks apply marks to enemies. At 5 stacks, the marks disappear, dealing damage and inflicting silence and slow on the enemy.

skills.name: Snaking Strike
skills.description: Dashes twice in the target direction, and the direction of the 2nd dash can be controlled. Deals damage to enemies in her path. lf the skill hits an enemy, she can use it again before it enters cooldown.

skills.name: Dagger Waltz
skills.description: Throws a light sword in the target direction, slowing and dealing damage to enemies in range when it reaches max range. When Hua Mulan reaches the light sword, she puts it away, reducing thecooldown of Dagger Waltz.

skills.name: Blooming Blade (Dual Swords Form)
skills.description: Deals damage to enemies within range, gaining damage reduction during this time. Enhances herself, gaining Physical Attack during the enhancement. Switches to Heavy Sword Form.

tips: Mulan is a Medium Assassin (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.1% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Fortitude → Axe of Torment → Cuirass of Savagery → Starbreaker → Pure Sky → Succubus Cloak.
Run Mutation for stats that match Mulan's Assassin kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Snaking Strike → Dagger Waltz → Blooming Blade (Dual Swords Form) → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
Teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
Mulan excels into Liang, Mi Yue, Nuwa. Avoid blind picking into Diaochan, Heino, Hou Yi without team peel.
Mulan sits at Tier B globally (51.1% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: Is Mulan good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Mulan is Tier B Assassin with 51.1% win rate, 0.4% pick rate, and 0.0% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Mulan build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Fortitude, Axe of Torment, Cuirass of Savagery, Starbreaker, Pure Sky, Succubus Cloak. Run Mutation arcana with Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Mulan?
faqs.answer: Pick Diaochan, Heino, Hou Yi into Mulan. Deny Clash Lane resources early and force fights before Mulan completes core items. Mulan struggles when the enemy can peel and group them.

faqs.question: Who does Mulan counter?
faqs.answer: Mulan is strong into Liang, Mi Yue, Nuwa according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Mulan when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Clash Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Mulan good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Mulan sits at Tier B globally (51.1% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.

faqs.question: What lane should Mulan play?
faqs.answer: Mulan is tagged Clash Lane in Camp export (Fighter, Assassin). Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Mulan?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Mutation arcana. Battle spell: Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Mulan or Wukong — which is better?
faqs.answer: Mulan vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Mulan has +1.4% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Mulan when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Mulan?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.0%). Focus bans on higher-tier Assassin picks unless targeting a one-trick.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Blooming Blade (Dual Swords Form) (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Dagger Waltz provides mobility or stick—max first. Snaking Strike second for damage. Blooming Blade (Dual Swords Form) on every level.
